faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about how we work and our collaboration format.

items.question: How does ordering work?
items.answer: We discuss the brief, agree on timeline and price, prepayment, and then start work.

items.question: How is the work process structured?
items.answer: During development we keep you updated on all stages and give you access to the project for edits and changes.

items.question: How many hours am I online?
items.answer: On average I'm online about 18 hours a day, from 10:00 to 4:00 MSK.

items.question: What kind of projects do we take on?
items.answer: We take on projects of any complexity, from landing pages to fullstack applications, with any budget.
